topics.title: Magic-String Package Updates
topics.summary: The magic-string package has reached 140 million downloads per week. Recent updates include a PR for ESM-only support and significant performance improvements after removing sourcemaps. This reflects the ongoing efforts to enhance high-impact packages in the ecosystem.

topics.title: Atproto x IETF Meetup
topics.summary: The atproto x IETF meetup is scheduled for this evening at the Metalab, featuring discussions on @npmx.dev, Fedisky, and various web methods within atproto. Attendees can enjoy vegan curry while networking and learning about these technologies.
